description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle in manual mode was stopped in the left turn lane, when a passenger vehicle approaching from the rear in the right adjacent 
lane collided into the right passenger side doors of the Zoox vehicle. The passenger vehicle immediately fled the scene. The Zoox vehicle 
incurred moderate damage to the right side passenger doors. The police were not called at the scene but a police report was filed. There 
were no injuries.
Print
Clear Form
